meaning: n.蒙得维的亚(乌拉圭首都),蒙得维的亚省(乌拉圭省名)
examples: What was supposed to be a routine flight from Montevideo, Uruguay turned into a fight for their lives.
When he was seven he moved to Montevideo and it was on the dusty streets of the capital that Suarez developed his skills.
And many flights in and out of the Uruguayan capital Montevideo have also been cancelled, affecting thousands more travellers.
She travelled to Montevideo, Uruguay's capital, for Mr Mujica's inauguration, an important symbolic gesture.
But in Montevideo it was granted observer status on all the group's deliberative bodies.
